chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1734 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 26-02-2025 Mr. Muhammad Hanif Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Jahangir Advocate for Respondent/TMC Korangi Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Inspector Amanullah P.S. Korangi SIP Muhammad Javed P.S. Zaman Town DSP Shabbir, Korangi Traffic Mr. Sarwar Ali Advocate files memo of appearance and comments on behalf of Respondent No.20/TMC Landhi which are taken on record. Learned counsel for the Petitioner remains unable to befall the Petitioner within qualification of aggrieved person per Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
